* north star

Guaranteeing good results with AI systems is hard. We'll help you get better at it.

Define what good looks like

↑

Set criteria

↑

Measure against them

↑

Optimize

To build trust in your AI product you need guarantees that the outcomes your system produces will consistently meet user needs. We'll help you define your success criteria and let you monitor improvements (the effects of your changes?) across the stack to make sure you get there.

What we do

We work hands-on with a small number of companies to map their AI systems, find where the gap between business intent and engineering measurement lives, and close it.

What you can expect

  • Align business and engineering An interface to establish shared success criteria in product language that engineering can instrument against.
  • Evaluate results How do you know you're getting better? We'll build or improve an existing evaluation pipeline driven by business-defined success criteria.
  • AI engineering stack optimization Once success criteria exist, spend, retrieval quality, or model choice become optimizable against something real.
  • Understand what you're monitoring What signals are being captured and are they the right ones? We want to connect the right traces to outcomes.

Why work with us

  • We need you more than you need us We are working on a product and doing user research. We are offering help for insight into your AI stack in return.
  • We have built production AI apps and understand the pain We all know the thrill of vibe coding. We've all considered if others might find our product just as useful as we do. But how do we make sure it works before we get it to them?

hello@biene.club

north star — 2026
